<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 260211 => 'Lusaka Province', 260212 => 'Ndola/Copperbelt and Luapula Provinces', 260213 => 'Livingstone/Southern Province', 260214 => 'Kasama/Northern Province', 260215 => 'Kabwe/Central Province', 260216 => 'Chipata/Eastern Province', 260217 => 'Solwezi/Western Province', 260218 => 'Mongu/North-Western Province', ];
